signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the control panel.
signIn.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
signIn.tokenNotFound: Authentication session not found. Please sign in again.
signIn.unauthorized: Your session is not authorized. Please sign in again.
signIn.roleNotFound: Role information not found. Please contact support.
signIn.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
signIn.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
signIn.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
signIn.genericError: Login failed. Please try again later.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.subtitle: Create your account to get started.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.emailSent: Reset code sent! Check your email.
forgotPassword.otpSent: Verification code sent to your email!
forgotPassword.passwordReset: Password reset successfully! Please sign in.
forgotPassword.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input.
forgotPassword.emailNotFound: Email address not found. Please check and try again.
forgotPassword.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
forgotPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgotPassword.verifySubtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your email.
forgotPassword.otpMinLength: Code must be at least 4 characters
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Create a new password for your account.

logout.title: Logout
logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?
